productDisplayName: Spalding Unisex NBA Highlight Red Basketballs
description: Offering absolute grip with a unique retro design, this NBA Highlights Basketball works equally great indoors and outdoors. Made of durable rubber that helps facilitate a great game on all court surfaces Nubs throughout the ball surface offering absolute grip and great game characteristics Brand name and collection printed in gold and black Care Wipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dust Store in a clean, dry place, preferably inside a basketball bag
